news.title: DEM Parti'nin çerçeve yasa beklentisi: İtirazlar ve talepler neler?
news.summary: İktidarın "Terörsüz Türkiye" olarak adlandırdığı yeni çözüm sürecinin hukuki altyapısının ilk adımı olacak çerçeve yasaya ilişkin tartışmalar sürüyor. DEM Partililerle görüşen Ayşe Sayın Ankara'dan bildiriyor.

news.title: İngiltere'de başbakanlar neden sürekli değişiyor?
news.summary: Keir Starmer, son 10 yılda görevden ayrılan altıncı İngiltere başbakanı oldu. BBC'den Rob Watson, bu istikrarsızlığın ardındaki nedenleri inceliyor.

news.title: ABD, bir yük gemisine saldırının ardından İran'ı vurdu

news.title: Cami avlusunda bıçaklı saldırı. İki kişi hayatını kaybetti

news.title: Balkondan düşen kadın hayatını kaybetti
news.summary: Uşak'ta şüpheli şekilde evinin balkonundan beton zemine düşen kadın hayatını kaybetti.

news.title: Tamar Tanrıyar hakkında gözaltı kararı

news.title: DMD hastası çocuk için toplanan paraları çaldı. Diğer kampanyaları da gözüne kestirmiş

news.title: 'Every person saved is a miracle': Families call to trapped loved ones in region devastated by Venezuela quakes
news.summary: Families keep vigil at buildings where they fear their loved ones are trapped, but face an impossible task to move heavy debris.

news.summary: Strikes have killed at least one person, state media say a day after Lebanon and Israel signed a framework agreement.

news.title: Why Kim Jong Un never talks about his mother - or her controversial bloodline
news.summary: Very few North Koreans know about her, as her origin could threaten the regime’s legitimacy.

news.title: Heatwave breaks records in Germany, Denmark and Czech Republic
news.summary: An estimated 150 million people are now experiencing temperatures of over 35C across Europe.

news.title: Donald Trump nominates ex-state trooper Lance Schroyer as ICE director
news.summary: The immigration enforcement agency has been without a Senate-confirmed director since 2017, during Trump's first term.

news.title: Trump nominates former Oklahoma state trooper to head ICE
news.summary: President Trump nominated Lance Schroyer, a former Oklahoma state trooper, to direct Immigration and Customs Enforcement. The agency hasn't had a Senate-confirmed director since the Obama administration.

news.title: Critical fire weather complicates firefighting efforts in massive Utah wildfire
news.summary: Firefighters working on the nation's largest current wildfire, burning in southern Utah, are being challenged by historic weather conditions. Extreme wildfire behavior is expected to continue through the weekend.

news.title: Uzbekistan makes its World Cup debut, a first for Central Asia
news.summary: The country is the first Central Asian nation to qualify for the World Cup, and Uzbek fans have reveled in showcasing their country and culture. The country's president calls the team a symbol of the "new Uzbekistan."

news.title: Opinion: Ranch dressing is a winner at the World Cup games

news.title: Trump administration partially lifts export ban on Anthropic's most advanced AI model
news.summary: The U.S. government is asserting a new level of influence over AI, controlling which companies can access Anthropic's new models. OpenAI agreed to let the administration screen users of its new model.

facts.text: Honey never spoils — edible honey has been found in ancient tombs.
A day on Venus is longer than its year.
Bananas are berries; strawberries are not.
